dialogueChunks.intro: We made it, {player_name}. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} passed, and thanks to your help, {quest_stakes_the} survived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} battered but standing. {quest_ally} has organized the rebuilding effort, and spirits are higher than they have been in days.
dialogueChunks.outro: You stood with us through the worst of it. This settlement would not exist without you.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the worst is behind us. Your work to {quest_action} saved more than we dared hope.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} intact. Not whole, not perfect, but intact. {quest_threat_The} could have wiped us from the map, and you stood in its way.
dialogueChunks.outro: We will rebuild. Stronger, smarter, and never forgetting who helped us survive.

dialogueChunks.intro: The storm has passed, {player_name}. Literally and figuratively. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} over, and {quest_stakes_the} endure.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} bears the scars, but the people are alive and determined. {quest_ally} said it best: the disaster tested us, and you were the reason we passed that test.
dialogueChunks.outro: From rubble, we rise. Thank you for helping us find our footing.
